properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He built a house on the sand Glittering from the morning sun He’s not aware that its days are numbered When the storm hits the ground

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He gambles on stones and thorns Sowing seeds on nowhere land He doesn't realise these hinders Faith grows thin and couldn’t yield

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Don’t take your faith for granted It’s not a cloth when you want it Cause faith is sacred Give the best to God with your faith Fill with love and take care of it Faith will lead you

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: She runs a house of chaos Filled with pride and arrogance She’s not aware that its days are numbered When the Master returns

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: She’s focused on gems and stones Material things that she adored Not realising that these hinders Faith won’t grow anymore
